page: Microsoft Azure D64s_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dsv7 server family. It is built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and features 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor. The system is provisioned with 256.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server type operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached storage options, though the instance is Premium Storage capable. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses, and there are no integrated GPUs on this instance.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the D64s_v7 offers a standard resource density suitable for general-purpose workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent compute performance without resource contention. This configuration is appropriate for enterprise applications, relational databases, web serving, and application servers that require a balance of compute power and memory without the need for local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure D64s_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dsv7 family, featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs on an x86_64 Intel processor. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. It contains no GPUs and offers zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. With its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource profile, the D64s_v7 is designed for consistent performance in enterprise applications, web serving, and relational databases that do not require local disk space or hardware acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D64s_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 256.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

tagline: A general-purpose virtual machine featuring sixty-four dedicated Intel vCPUs and a balanced two hundred fifty-six gigabytes of system memory.

256.0 GB of RAM providing a balanced 1:4 core-to-memory ratio
